_comment: Mutation testing for the pure core logic, via the node:test runner. Replaces the bespoke mutation runner in the old quality.mjs.
_thresholds_note: Full scope (no hand-picked subset). Current ~22% is honest: several core modules (graph/markdown/store/author-index/theme/session) lack unit tests. break is a ratchet floor to prevent regression; raise it as tests are added.
